node.data: {"M36":{"lit":"պարտատէրն","context":"text/body/ab[131]","n":"պարտատէրն"},"M10105":{"lit":"պար<lb xml:id=\"l104436756\" facs=\"#z104436756\" n=\"17\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>տատէրն","line":{"facs":"#z104436755","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104436755","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"10105-028a"},"n":"պարտատէրն"},"M6616":{"lit":"պարտատէրն","context":"text/body/ab[26]","n":"պարտատէրն"},"V31":{"lit":"պարտատէրն","line":{"facs":"#z104337187","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104337187","n":"14"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_133359 copy"},"n":"պարտատէրն"},"M3119":{"lit":"պար<lb xml:id=\"l104292138\" facs=\"#z104292138\" n=\"11\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>տատէրն","line":{"facs":"#z104292137","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104292137","n":"10"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-139a"},"n":"պարտատէրն"}}
